title: Property Consultant - Inorbit Malls - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Inorbit Malls - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Inorbit Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
